purpose: A button that opens a menu of related actions when clicked. Supports Regular mode (entire button opens menu) or Split mode (text fires default action, arrow opens menu).
whenToUse: When 2+ related actions can be grouped under one trigger
For "Add" with multiple type options (Add API, Add Flow, etc.)
In Split mode when one action is more common than others
whenNotToUse: When fewer than 2 menu items exist — use Button
doRules: Use Split mode when default action is common (e.g. "Save" + "Save and Close")
dontRules: Do not use MenuButton when fewer than 2 menu items exist
Do not nest MenuButton inside MenuButton
Do not use long menu items (keep under 30 chars)

layoutGuidance.alignment: Menu opens below or above based on viewport space.

contentGuidance.labelLength: 1–2 words on the button; menu items max 30 chars.

responsiveBehavior.S: May collapse to icon-only on tight viewports

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Enter/Space opens menu; arrow keys navigate items; Escape closes
Button text describes the menu purpose; menu items have accessible names
Focus stays on trigger when menu opens; moves to first item on arrow down

exceptions: Use SplitButton component (not MenuButton) when default action and dropdown share the same icon
